content.en:
Ye Tian, who was hiding in the shadows, sensed a galaxy-level desolate demon and was flying towards his current position.

And when Ye Tian mobilized the power of the Desolate Realm to sense the other party, the galaxy-level Desolate Demon also sensed Ye Tian, and thought that Ye Tian was a member of the same clan.

"Who's up ahead?"

The galactic desolate demon shouted.

But just as he flew closer, a monstrous giant hand instantly captured this galaxy-level desolate demon, and then Ye Tian used his powerful immortal soul to exert his hypnotic talent on others.

In an instant, this galaxy-level desolate demon was controlled by Ye Tian's hypnosis, so that he lost even the slightest chance to ask for help.

After controlling this galaxy-level desolate demon, Ye Tian began to interrogate the other party, trying to learn some news about the desolate tower from the other party.

"Tell me everything about the Wild Tower!"

Ye Tian asked.

Then, the galaxy-level desolate demon immediately began to tell the news about the desolate tower.

Soon, Ye Tian learned more about the Deserted Tower.

As he knew before, the Desolate Tower was indeed only accessible to Desolate Demons and Innate Spirits, and other upper and lower clans were inaccessible.

And the only requirement to enter the Wasteland Tower is to be able to mobilize the power of the Wasteland.

Once the power of the Wasteland is mobilized, it is equivalent to getting the approval of the Wasteland Tower, and you can enter the Wasteland Tower.

Although the other upper clans and lower clans could not enter the barren tower, the innate gods still forbade them to get close to the barren tower, firstly, they were afraid that the situation of the barren tower would be leaked, after all, no matter how much the other upper clans guessed, it was also a guess, and it could not be really confirmed, but once it was confirmed that the condition for entering the barren tower was to mobilize the power of the wasteland, then it would be a big problem.

Some of the Lords may take risks, such as taking possession of a demon's body, or other means.

And what the innate gods are most afraid of is that the news has spread to the outside world, causing the covetousness of all the races in the outside world.

From the mouth of this galaxy-level desolate demon, he learned that the desolate tower contained a great secret, even among the desolate demon clan, he could not know it with his galaxy-level identity, and he could only learn more after entering the desolate tower.

This galaxy-level desolate demon has not yet entered the desolate tower for the time being, but in order to accumulate strength, and then enter the desolate tower when it is stronger, so as to ensure that he can get more benefits.

At the same time, this galaxy-level desolate demon also knew that the desolate tower had three cosmic god peaks and a desolate demon who dominated the realm.

As for the other innate gods, they will occasionally enter the barren tower, but there are usually no innate gods in charge.

In addition, the Deserted Tower can be entered again and again, but it takes a long time each time, so every opportunity to enter the Wild Tower is very valuable.

Ye Tian asked a lot of things, and after understanding the same, he decided to disguise himself as this galaxy-level desolate demon.

Of course, it is not enough to rely on camouflage talent alone, you also need some treasures to assist in camouflage, and Ye Tian naturally does not lack this kind of treasure.

And this level of camouflage also needs to change the soul breath.

The cosmic gods and masters can easily see through a person's soul breath, if the soul breath is different, it is useless to just disguise the appearance and bloodline.

"Disguising the soul breath will be difficult for others, but I can. I have cultivated the Hades Secret Codex, and there are some secret techniques on the Hades Secret Book that change the breath of the soul, and once they are cast, even the Lord will not be able to see it. It's just that it won't last too long, but just entering the Desert Tower is enough!" Ye Tian thought.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian let this galaxy-level desolate demon fall into a deep sleep for a long time, and he began to disguise himself.

After a while, Ye Tian completely disguised himself as this galaxy-level desolate demon - Sword Gu!

......

Deserted Tower.

Standing in the center of the Desolate Demon Territory, this mysterious ancient tower is surrounded by three smaller towers.

These three small towers were built by the innate gods, and a large number of lineups and defensive means were arranged on them, and even the Supreme could not break through these three small towers for a while.

The three small towers can also hold up the defenses and protect the towers from the enemy from infiltrating the towers.

It can be said that the innate gods have done enough defensive means, which shows the importance attached to the barren tower.

And among these three small towers, there are strong people of the Desolate Demon Clan, and they will rotate a batch every once in a while.

this day.

A galaxy-level desolate demon arrives in front of the Desolate Tower.

This galaxy-level desolate demon is Ye Tian!

"Jian Gu, why did you come here?"

A middle-aged man suddenly appeared in front of Ye Tian, and the other party stared at Ye Tian with a puzzled look and asked.

Ye Tian took a look, and then used his copying talent to check the other party's situation and confirm the other party's identity.

"Elder of the Demon Pavilion, I want to enter the Deserted Tower!"

Ye Tian said seriously.

He also knew the identity of the man in front of him from the mouth of the galaxy-level Desolate Demon Sword Gu, he was the peak level powerhouse of the Cosmic God of the Desolate Demon Clan, and he was also one of the elder groups, and his combat power was extremely powerful.

In terms of strength, Ye Tian is naturally not an opponent now.

After all, with the strength of the Demon Pavilion Elder, if he mobilized the power of the Desolate Realm, it would even be enough to match the combat power of Tianzun.

And Jian Gu is also a friend of the Demon Pavilion's father, and the two sides are more familiar.

If he hadn't interrogated Jian Gu, he would definitely have revealed flaws in the face of the Demon Pavilion Elders, but now he even knew the tone and attitude of Jian Gu and the Demon Pavilion Elders in his usual conversations, so he wouldn't show any mistakes.

"It's too early for you to enter the Wasteland Tower now, the galaxy level and the galaxy level are two very important stages, and they are also two opportunities to get earth-shattering opportunities from the Wasteland Tower. You can accumulate some strength and get better opportunities!"

The Demon Pavilion Elder persuaded.

Ye Tian hurriedly said: "Elder of the Demon Pavilion, in fact, I have always hidden part of my strength, and now I feel that the accumulation is almost over, I still want to enter the Deserted Tower!"

"Okay, it's your decision, I can't stop it, if you want to go in, go in!"

The Demon Pavilion Elder disappeared and returned to one of the small towers.

Immediately, Ye Tian walked towards the Deserted Tower.

From beginning to end, the elders of the Demon Pavilion and the other desolate demon powerhouses who guarded here did not find out that Ye Tian was a fake Sword Gu.

Deserted Tower.

Ye Tian came to the gate of the Wasteland Tower, and the gate here was a light curtain.

If you want to enter the light curtain, you must open the barren talent and mobilize the power of the desolate world to wrap yourself before you can pass through the light curtain.

"Wildline talent, open!"

Ye Tian opened the Desolate Pattern talent, mobilized the power of the Desolate Realm to wrap himself, and then passed through the light curtain and truly entered the Desolate Tower.

Interior of the Deserted Tower.

Ye Tian walked in and finally breathed a sigh of relief.

In fact, before he came in, he was still a little worried, for fear that the desolate demon clan had hidden other conditions.

But apparently there are no hidden conditions, and mobilizing the power of the Desolation is the only condition.

At this time, Ye Tian was finally curious.

He really wanted to know what secret the Wasteland contained, and this secret was about to be exposed to him!
